summary: Verified all 6 features for the financial trading platform. All features are implemented correctly and working as expected.

feature_1_commission_date_picker.description: Simulate Commission dialog has Commission Date date picker field
feature_1_commission_date_picker.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Commission Date' field with date picker showing '01/27/2026'

feature_2_adjust_commission_in_daily_pro.description: Daily Projection Table Commission column is clickable and opens Adjust Commission dialog
feature_2_adjust_commission_in_daily_pro.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Adjust Commission' dialog with 'Add or update commission for Wed, Jan 1' and Commission Amount input

feature_3_members_role_filter.description: Role filter dropdown shows 'Members' instead of 'Users'
feature_3_members_role_filter.evidence: Screenshot shows dropdown with 'All Roles', 'Members', 'Admins', 'Super Admins' options - no 'Users' option

feature_4_sort_by_account_value.description: Admin Members page has 'Sort by Account Value' dropdown with Low→High and High→Low options
feature_4_sort_by_account_value.evidence: Screenshot shows dropdown with 'Default Order', 'Account Value: Low → High', 'Account Value: High → Low' options

feature_5_deactivate_reactivate_user.description: Member Details dialog Actions tab has Deactivate/Reactivate button
feature_5_deactivate_reactivate_user.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Deactivate User' section with 'Prevent this user from logging in' description and red 'Deactivate' button

feature_6_did_not_trade_button.description: Daily Projection Table shows 'Did Not Trade' button for missed (past untraded) days
feature_6_did_not_trade_button.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Did Not Trade' button (with X icon) next to 'Adjust Trade' button for each missed day in January 2025

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features have been verified and are working correctly. The database has been migrated from 'user' to 'member' role. Commission dialog has date picker. Adjust Commission can be accessed by clicking the Commission column in Daily Projection. 'Did not trade' button appears next to 'Adjust Trade' for missed days. Deactivate/Reactivate buttons are in the Actions tab of Member Details dialog. Sort dropdown is next to status filter on Admin Members page.

feature_verification_summary.Feature #1 - Commission Date Picker: VERIFIED - Simulate Commission dialog has Commission Date field with date picker
feature_verification_summary.Feature #2 - Adjust Commission in Daily: VERIFIED - Commission column clickable, opens Adjust Commission dialog
feature_verification_summary.Feature #3 - Members Role Filter: VERIFIED - Dropdown shows 'Members' not 'Users', no 'user' roles in DB
feature_verification_summary.Feature #4 - Sort by Account Value: VERIFIED - Dropdown with Low→High and High→Low options
feature_verification_summary.Feature #5 - Deactivate/Reactivate User: VERIFIED - Button in Actions tab of Member Details dialog
feature_verification_summary.Feature #6 - Did Not Trade Button: VERIFIED - Button appears for missed days in Daily Projection Table
